CONSTRAINTS.isNotEmpty: This field should not be empty
CONSTRAINTS.isString: This field must be a string
CONSTRAINTS.isNumber: This field must be a number
CONSTRAINTS.isInt: This field must be an integer
CONSTRAINTS.isBoolean: This field must be a boolean
CONSTRAINTS.isEmail: Must be a valid email address
CONSTRAINTS.isArray: This field must be an array
CONSTRAINTS.isObject: This field must be an object
CONSTRAINTS.isIn: Must be one of the allowed values
CONSTRAINTS.isPhoneNumber: Must be a valid phone number
